mod.easyspec.name: EasySpec
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.easyspec: Type the configured trigger in chat to toggle spectator mode and return.
message.easyspec.toggled: §aSwitched to spectator mode. Type !%s to return.
message.easyspec.restored: §aRestored to original game mode and teleported back.
message.easyspec.reset: §aConfig has been reset to default values!
